method: Faceted scatter plots using D3-joined data: 1) X=batting impact score (runs × strike_rate/matches_played), Y=win ratio. 2) X=bowling impact score (wickets × (1 - economy/10)/matches_played), Y=win ratio. Team-level aggregation with lasso selection (I2) for multi-player comparison.
objective: Identify correlation patterns between calculated performance metrics and match victory rates

method: Parallel coordinates plot (V3) showing: Batting Impact, Bowling Impact, Win Ratio %, and Matches Played dimensions. Top 50 players filtered by sum of normalized impact scores. Color encodes team affiliation.
objective: Identify players with consistently high multidimensional performance across winning matches

method: Geospatial map of venues with embedded bar charts showing: 1) Average batting impact vs bowling impact 2) Win/loss ratio distribution. Linked to temporal slider (I3) for season filtering.
objective: Analyze how venue characteristics and seasonal variations affect player contributions to victories

method: Connected scatter plot with dual Y-axes: Batting impact score trajectory (line) and Bowling impact score trajectory (area chart). X-axis=season (I3 filtered). Annotated with major tournament markers from event_name.
objective: Track evolution of player performance impact on match outcomes over time

method: Stacked bar chart (V4) showing percentage contribution of batting/bowling metrics to team wins: X-axis=player, Y-axis=% contribution (batting_impact/(batting+bowling_impact)). Filterable by minimum matches played threshold.
objective: Quantify relative importance of batting vs bowling performance in securing match victories
